title: Auth token cache TTL
body: The auth token cache TTL is 5 minutes; a token refreshed earlier than that window is ignored by the gateway and the stale one is served.
supersede_body: The auth token cache TTL is 15 minutes as of gateway v2.3; a refresh within that window now propagates immediately to the gateway.

title: Session token sliding window
body: The session token cache uses a 30-minute sliding window that resets on each request, which is a different mechanism from the auth token TTL.

title: Postgres pool max size
body: The Postgres connection pool max size is 20; exceeding it raises QueuePool limit errors under sustained concurrent load.

title: SQLite WAL needs busy_timeout
body: SQLite in WAL mode requires busy_timeout to be set, or concurrent writers intermittently hit 'database is locked' errors.

title: Reindex after bulk import
body: To keep search correct, run the reindex job after every bulk import, otherwise the dense vectors go stale and recall silently degrades.

title: RRF fuses BM25 and cosine
body: Dense recall fuses the BM25 lexical leg and the cosine dense leg using reciprocal rank fusion with k equal to 60.

title: Rerank is off the hot path
body: The cross-encoder rerank only runs off the hot path; the prompt inject path stays BM25-only so it never blocks on a model load.

title: Flags over long-lived branches
body: Prefer feature flags over long-lived branches for risky changes; a flag ramps gradually and rolls back cleanly without a revert.

title: Canary blocks prod promotion
body: The deploy pipeline blocks promotion to prod when the canary error rate exceeds 1 percent over a 10-minute window.

title: Backdated retain stamps ignored
body: Backdated timestamps passed to retain are ignored by the ingest queue; ingestion order, not the supplied stamp, determines recall recency.

title: Fold DDL into schema.sql
body: Run migrations through Alembic AND fold the same DDL into schema.sql, or fresh installs diverge because init builds from schema.sql not migrations.

title: Embeddings only in reflect
body: Embeddings are computed only during the reflect pass, so a memory written between reflects is invisible to the dense leg until the next reflect.

title: Dedup collapses shared prefixes
body: Text-similarity dedup at a 0.90 threshold collapses fixtures that share a long common prefix; put the unique content first to keep them distinct.

title: Keep data-model axes orthogonal
body: Keep data-model axes orthogonal; prefer an extensible category column over a boolean when the set of values may grow later.
